columns.extraction_plan: The treatment arms are "ADT plus D" (Androgen Deprivation Therapy plus Docetaxel) and "ADT alone" (Androgen Deprivation Therapy alone). This information is explicitly stated multiple times. On page 1, in the Abstract, under "Design, setting, and participants": "Randomized phase 3 trial of ADT plus D versus ADT alone in 385 mNCPC patients; median follow-up of 7 yr." On page 2, in the "Introduction" section: "The GETUG-AFU15 trial... assessed the benefits of the addition of D to ADT in patients with mNCPC..." On page 2, in the "Patients and methods" section: "Eligible patients were randomized in a 1:1 ratio to ADT plus D (75 mg/m² for 21 d, up to nine cycles) or ADT alone."
